data.title: Former Federal Reserve Governor Coogler faced an ethics investigation before resigning.
data.description: Former Federal Reserve Governor Andrew Kugler resigned abruptly because Fed Chairman Jerome Powell refused to grant her an exemption from handling financial assets that violated the Fed's code of ethics, according to a Federal Reserve official. The official stated that Kugler was under investigation by the Fed's internal oversight body for recent financial filings before her resignation in August. Documents released Saturday show that officials at the Fed's Office of Ethics refused to approve Kugler's latest financial filings and referred the matter to the Fed's Office of the Inspector General. These filings, published on the website of the U.S. Government Office of Ethics, indicate details of her financial activities that allegedly violated the Fed's internal code of ethics. Kugler announced her resignation on August 1, effective August 8, without specifying a reason. (Jinshi)

data.title: An address spent $5,528,000 to buy 1,760 ETH at an average price of $3,141 per ETH.

The remaining pending orders were not filled. He currently holds more than 60 million USDT0 and $68.68 million worth of ETH.
